name: Asparagus Topped Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a baking dish and place tomato slices in the bottom.
2. Put asparagus on top of tomatoes.
3. Combine the other ingredients and spread on asparagus.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 to 15 minutes.
Note: You can use fresh asparagus. Also, substitute French-style green beans for asparagus and sprinkle crumbled bacon on top of cheese.
